assignments.value: NUKAVARAPU PRANEETH Guntur, Andhra Pradesh +91 8125491948 | nukavarapupraneeth@gmail.com LinkedIn | GitHub | LeetCode | CodeChef | HackerRank Professional Summary Computer Science undergraduate skilled in Java, Python, Data Structures & Algorithms, Spring Boot, and AWS Cloud. Passionate about software engineering, full-stack development, and solving real-world problems. Education KL University Guntur, Andhra Pradesh Bachelor of Technology (Computer Science and Engineering) Jun 2024 – May 2028 CGPA: 8.72 / 10.0 Internship Experience AI-ML Virtual Internship Apr 2026 – Jun 2026 Google for Developers & EduSkills Virtual • Completed an 8-week virtual internship focused on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. • Worked with Python libraries and datasets to understand data preprocessing and machine learning workflows. • Learned supervised learning concepts including classification and regression techniques. • Applied machine learning concepts through hands-on exercises and practical assignments. • Improved analytical and problem-solving skills by working on real-world AI/ML tasks. Technical Skills Programming Languages: Java, Python, C, JavaScript Core CS: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks Frameworks: Spring Boot, Hibernate, React.js, Node.js Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL Cloud: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner Developer Tools: Git, GitHub, Linux, VS Code, Eclipse Projects Student Peer Review & Collaboration Platform | Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScriptGitHub • Built a full-stack web application for peer review and collaboration. • Developed RESTful APIs using Spring Boot and Hibernate to manage users, projects, and peer reviews. • Designed and implemented a normalized MySQL database to efficiently store application data. • Created a responsive user interface using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for seamless user interaction. • Used Git and GitHub for collaborative development and version control. Achievements • Rank 172 on the Smart Interviews Coding Leaderboard. • Club Lead – KLU FOCUS Technical Club. Certifications • AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner • AI-ML Virtual Internship Certificate (Google for Developers & EduSkills) • Essential Automation Certification

parameters.text:
=You are an expert ATS Resume Writer.

Candidate Resume:

{{$json.resume}}

Selected Job:

{{ JSON.stringify($json.body.job, null, 2) }}

Rewrite the resume specifically for this job.

Rules:

- Never invent experience.
- Never invent internships.
- Never invent projects.
- Never invent certifications.
- Only improve wording.
- Add ATS keywords from the job description.
- Reorder skills based on relevance.
- Optimize the Professional Summary.
- Keep the resume to one page.

Output format:
- Return ONLY a complete, valid HTML document starting with <!DOCTYPE html> and ending with </html>.
- Do NOT wrap the output in Markdown code fences or add any commentary.
- Include a <style> block in the <head> with clean, professional, print-friendly inline CSS (readable sans-serif font, ~11-12px body text, clear section headings, bold candidate name, subtle section dividers, tight one-page margins suitable for A4).
- Use semantic HTML (h1 for name, h2 for section titles, ul/li for bullet points).
